strategy.path_forward: A human Wikipedia editor with no COI connection to artonly.io would need to review and potentially submit a new draft. The clean draft prepared in the 2026-06-13 session is available. Alternatively, the artonly.io team could seek a WP:VOLUN editor to help.
strategy.reviewer_engagement: Always thank reviewers by name, respond on talk page within 24h, be specific about what changed
strategy.source_quality: LBBOnline, shots.net, The One Club, SHOOTonline, Campaign US = strong. VideoStatic, EARMILK, EDM Canada = acceptable. YouTube, Vimeo, IMVDb, self-published = never.
strategy.what_reviewers_want: Independent newspaper/magazine coverage ABOUT the subject, not about his clients or their campaigns. Trade press (LBBOnline, SHOOTonline, Campaign US) is acceptable but the focus must be on the director, not the brand.
